title: [CI flake] podman stats --format json - no output
body:
I've experienced flakes in the podman-stats e2e tests and could reproduce it manualy:
```
libpod (master) $ ./bin/podman stats --all --no-stream --format json|jq .
[
  {
    "id": "c74d1aa69138",
    "name": "jovial_kalam",
    "cpu_percent": "--",
    "mem_usage": "0.01%",
    "mem_percent": "1.274MB / 16.65GB",
    "net_io": "-- / --",
    "block_io": "-- / --",
    "pids": "1"
  }
]
libpod (master) $ ./bin/podman stats --all --no-stream --format json|jq .
```

The second call yields no output, ultimately yielding the marshal errors we see in the CI (see below):
```
[+0953s] Running: /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/bin/podman --storage-opt vfs.imagestore=/tmp/podman/imagecachedir --root /tmp/podman_test294532388/crio --runroot /tmp/podman_test294532388/crio-run --runtime /usr/bin/crun --conmon /usr/bin/conmon --cni-config-dir /etc/cni/net.d --cgroup-manager systemd --tmpdir /tmp/podman_test294532388 --events-backend file --storage-driver vfs stats --all --no-stream --format json
[+0953s] output: 
[+0953s] unexpected end of JSON input
```

I'll try to further track it down and come up with a fix.

Cc @baude
